widgetData.source_sentence: Unless you have this jam-packed full of items, the unit collapses on itself. I never held it's shape therefore, making it hard to reach my items when I needed them. The silver metal pieces on the handle fell off soon after it arrived. I must have missed the "return by" date as I now am stuck with it.
sentences: very light weight. thin metal. nice looking just not a quality piece.it was okay for a kids gift. don't see it lasting very long as it will dent easy.
Good quality gasket and it was packaged well. Fit great as well.

Fit fine - do not stay up. I haven’t washed or stretched, literally too out of bag and tried on for a bit of walking around the house and within 30 minutes they bunched down. Not sure the elastic will last either. Other than that, colors/patterns and general fabric is nice.

widgetData.source_sentence: I never got my item even though it said delivered.
sentences: These hooks work great for my boutique I have. I am able to hang scarves and different things from them including purses. They take up less space and last forever. The quality is excellent and so is the price!
Had this Item for a year and it is already ripping everywhere and faded badly. I do not recommend.
Had this Item for a year and it is already ripping everywhere and faded badly. I do not recommend.

widgetData.source_sentence: Was not a kit, was only a small individual box of lipstick.
sentences: These hooks work great for my boutique I have. I am able to hang scarves and different things from them including purses. They take up less space and last forever. The quality is excellent and so is the price!

Fit fine - do not stay up. I haven’t washed or stretched, literally too out of bag and tried on for a bit of walking around the house and within 30 minutes they bunched down. Not sure the elastic will last either. Other than that, colors/patterns and general fabric is nice.

It did take a long time to receive, but I am one happy customer! The clip is sturdy and I will be hard pressed to break it. This is no cheap pot metal replacement but high quality. The screws provided didn't quite want to screw into the holes but that is okay because I had the originals. The seller was very helpful and responded quickly when contacted. Glad to have my EDC knife back in action!

widgetData.source_sentence: this was a birthday present when she opened the box the glass was broke and the light bulb was hanging it is really cute but don't bother really not worth the hassel
sentences: I was so disappointed in this mascara. I really like Stila Products too, but it was just a clumpy mess on brush and hard to apply with the wand design. I had to be extra careful even just applying it because of how messy it was coming out of tube. Ended up returning it because Amazon is super great on their return policy on Prime items.
Battery life is pretty short. But it super fun while it lasts!! My nephews loved them!
The Grinch seem to be of good quality. I would buy again.

widgetData.source_sentence: Wrong size for my husband. I need to return them, unfortunately.
sentences: Loved this hair brush! It's now much easier to detangle my frizzy hair after I wake up in the mornings. I wish I had found out about this much earlier. Thank you!
